concept: Ember Vault: Nix Ember reúne brasas, abre as asas de fogo, sobe em um arco compacto, atinge um ápice com anel de faíscas e pousa em uma agachada controlada.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: non-integrated animation-lab candidate for an existing Bomba PvP Champion. Create a clean 4 by 4 sprite-animation source sheet with exactly 16 distinct sequential frames for Nix Ember performing Ember Vault: crouch and gather ember energy, flare both wing flames, launch upward in a compact fiery arc, reach a brief apex with a ring of sparks, descend, and land in a controlled crouch. Each cell contains one complete character pose, consistently centered, with clear padding; read left-to-right then top-to-bottom as frames 00 through 15. Preserve Nix Ember's charcoal armor, glowing orange lava seams, bright orange eyes, dark topknot and orange ember wings. Use a perfectly flat #00ff00 chroma-key background with no floor, shadow, gradient, texture, text, watermark, bomb, extra character or crossing debris.

alpha.method: remove_chroma_key.py with auto-key border, soft matte, despill

grok.requestedTask: Organizar/extrair frames, spritesheets, contact sheet, preview e validar dimensões, alpha, frames e previews.
grok.result: Executou somente neste diretório; corrigiu frames-512 para 512x512 e regenerou atlases/previews, mas encerrou com exit code 1 após a validação final.

pipeline.grokImagine: indisponível; não utilizado e nenhum sucesso foi inventado

origin: Arte original gerada nesta thread pelo image_gen integrado, usando apenas referências locais do Champion.
license: Origem interna do projeto; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
